THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEN, WANCHUN (ATHENA) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DATING HOLDINGS, INC. *** THE COMPLAINT IS AMENDED TO ADD "DATING HOLDINGS, INC.", AS A DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT "TABLE FOR SIX", IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (THE CONTRACT AT PARAGRAPH 24 PROVIDES FOR METHODS OF CANCELLING. PLAINTIFF DID NOT COMPLY.)
